title: What Happened To
wikitext:
[]: What Happened To?             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Aug 02, 2009 3:05 pm Close to the end of 2.0 and it shows Toji, Hikari, and Kensuke, they are shown in Tokyo-3 while Zeruel attacks. At the end when 3rd Impact starts, the city is ripped apart from below, and a ton of damage is caused. What happened to them? Some time passed before 3rd Impact was starting, so they could have evacuated. Do you think they evacuated, or did they die?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Aug 02, 2009 3:09 pm I guess we'll see in the next film. Though didn't the preview for 2.0 say that Tokyo-3 was going to be evacuated.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Aug 02, 2009 4:37 pm The crazy ballsy move is to say they died. But that won't happen so most likely I expect there will be one scene in the first third of the film where Touji and Kensuke try to contact Shinji and get rudely shoved aside by NERV employees. Hikari I can't imagine anything more than one line or a visual cameo.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 02, 2009 4:43 pm I'm guessing either they died (Ballsy indeed ) OR they evacuated ala episode 24' stuffs.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Aug 02, 2009 5:29 pm They are alright, I doubt that Toji and the rest of them would not die like that.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Aug 02, 2009 8:28 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: They are alright, I doubt that Toji and the rest of them would not die like that.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Aug 02, 2009 10:55 pm NAveryW wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: They are alright, I doubt that Toji and the rest of them would not die like that.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Mon Aug 03, 2009 9:04 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: The crazy ballsy move is to say they died.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Aug 03, 2009 11:51 am pooe hikari, first time she gets some hug from touji and next thing you know, POOF, they are gone.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:19 pm They will be perfectly fine and alive at the beginning of 3.0..then Anno will pull, well, an "Anno" on us, and they will all be executed along with the majority of Tokyo-III's evacuated population by JSSDF soldiers under Seele's control. Because "Humans are teh evul!".

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:20 pm They died.

[]:             Quote Post by OKdesuKA » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:29 pm Doubt they are dead, it's bad enough Shinji didn't even want to hear their goodbye messages, it wouldn't be the best thing to come back to. Besides we still don't even know who the pilots are going to be for those other EVA's, could be Toji again, they did mention anyone in that classroom was a candidate to pilot EVA right?

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Wed Aug 05, 2009 9:50 pm I'm kind of hoping their souls become inserted into harpies and they have to either get destroyed or eat Asuka. Yes, Toji eating Asuka. Makes me all fuzzy inside.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Wed Aug 05, 2009 11:15 pm they did mention anyone in that classroom was a candidate to pilot EVA right?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Aug 06, 2009 2:25 am OKdesuKA wrote: Doubt they are dead, it's bad enough Shinji didn't even want to hear their goodbye messages, it wouldn't be the best thing to come back to. Besides we still don't even know who the pilots are going to be for those other EVA's, could be Toji again, they did mention anyone in that classroom was a candidate to pilot EVA right?

[]:             Quote Post by DanteNeverCry » Thu Aug 06, 2009 6:52 am SaltyJoe wrote: [ Fanwank: Third Impact did happen, and everything from here on will take place in Rebuild's version of Instrumentality. Which will somehow intersect with the original Instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Aug 06, 2009 1:46 pm As for the subject of people being dead, i think that people died in the third impact. and can we call it the "third impact"? because it somehow failed because Kaworu threw the lance at unit 01 which haulted the third impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Aug 06, 2009 3:50 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: They are alright, I doubt that Toji and the rest of them would not die like that.

[]:             Quote Post by remix220 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 4:12 pm They were my least fav characters. I'm sure they died....

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Thu Aug 06, 2009 6:25 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Ritsuko said that the Third Impact was beginning, not that it had actually happened.

Some time passed before 3rd Impact was starting, so they could have evacuated. Do you think they evacuated, or did they die?

Hikari I can't imagine anything more than one line or a visual cameo.
